Cotton: Cotton grows well in black soil. Avoid overwatering.
Groundnut: Groundnut requires well-drained soil and moderate watering.
Tomato: Provide regular watering and support sticks for healthy growth.
Millet: Millets grow well with less water and are drought-resistant.
Rice: Maintain standing water during the early growth stage.
Sugarcane: Sugarcane needs regular irrigation and fertile soil.
Watermelon: Grow in sandy soil with plenty of sunlight.
Wheat: Best grown during winter with moderate irrigation.
Mustard: Requires cool weather and well-drained soil.
Maize: Needs fertile soil and regular watering during growth.
